overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a cyberpunk-style video game showing a rainy night scene in a futuristic city. The camera follows a pedestrian carrying a glowing green umbrella through neon-lit streets with wet reflective surfaces, passing under overpasses and alongside commercial buildings with vibrant holographic advertisements.

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a wet cyberpunk city street at night, dominated by a hotel building with vibrant vertical neon lights. The camera moves forward along the reflective asphalt, passing orange traffic barriers while two pedestrians walk in the opposite direction. The atmosphere is illuminated by artificial neon signage and building lights.

events.description: character with glowing green umbrella enters frame and becomes the follow target
camera tilts upward to look at the towering skyscrapers above

agents.ego_description: following a pedestrian carrying a glowing green umbrella into the covered walkway section

notable_agents.action: walking ahead holding a large glowing green umbrella

entered.detail: overhead metal and glass structure providing partial cover
smooth gray concrete facade of adjacent building

elevated roadway or walkway crossing above the street

segments.scene_description: The camera begins following a distinctive pedestrian with a glowing green umbrella as they enter a covered walkway section. The environment transitions from open street to semi-covered corridor with concrete walls on the right and neon signage visible in the distance. The camera briefly tilts upward to reveal towering skyscrapers before continuing forward.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial corridor with shops and vending machines

safety barrier separating sidewalk from street level

segments.scene_description: Walking through the covered commercial corridor, the scene features various storefronts including a pawn shop and vending machines. The sidewalk is lined with metal railings on the left, and other pedestrians appear in the distance. The area is densely packed with neon signage and artificial lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered urban corridor approaching bright exit

events.description: approaching significantly brighter area at the end of the covered corridor

agents.ego_description: following the umbrella character toward the bright exit at the end of the street

entered.detail: large glowing cyan dragon sculpture or hologram on building facade
brightly lit opening at the end of the covered walkway
shadowed building front with minimal lighting

segments.scene_description: The final segment continues through the covered corridor, passing a prominent neon dragon hologram on the right and approaching a bright exit ahead. The pawn shop moves closer on the right side as the camera advances toward the illuminated opening at the end of the urban canyon.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rain-slicked cyberpunk street that gradually transitions into a densely packed, covered commercial corridor. It begins on an open asphalt road dominated by the vertical neon lights of a hotel and orange traffic barriers, moving forward past pedestrians under the glow of artificial signage. As the camera begins following a person with a glowing green umbrella, the environment shifts from the open street into a semi-covered walkway, where the view briefly tilts upward to reveal towering skyscrapers. The scene then narrows into a commercial corridor lined with metal railings, vending machines, and a pawn shop, while the lighting becomes more concentrated. Finally, the camera advances past a prominent neon dragon hologram toward a bright, illuminated exit at the end of the urban canyon.
